item.title: This is Trouble…She might not be as shiny as the other Porsche...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This is Trouble…She might not be as shiny as the other Porsches you see on Instagram these days but I am making it my mission to turn her back to her former glory!I will be restoring her with the help of friends & family. This Instagram page will be dedicated to her journey! Follow along if you’re interested in watching her transformation. #porsche #porsche356 #porscheclassic #porscheclub #porschelife #classiccars #classiccarrestoration #restorationproject #relatable #carguyproblems #carguysbelike #356restoration #thestoryoftrouble #followmyjourney #carmotivation

item.title: We knew she wasn’t perfect but we weren’t quite anticipating...
item.description:
View on Instagram


We knew she wasn’t perfect but we weren’t quite anticipating this much iron oxide… Hence, she was named Trouble. She might have a few flaws but what this does mean is that she’s incredibly original & we’ve made quite a few fun discoveries about her & her past. We’re excited to share these all with you. Please follow along if you’re interested in her journey as we work to restore her to her former glory! Comment below if you think Trouble is a suitable name for her. 🙌🏼#porsche #porsche356 #356 #356b #super90 #porscherestoration #carrestoration #vintagerestoration #vintagecar #classiccar #classicporsche #problemchild #rustbucket #barnfind

item.title: This is a sign to not give up on your passions and your hobbies....
item.description:
View on Instagram


This is a sign to not give up on your passions and your hobbies.I don’t know where they will take you.BUTI do know that if you don’t give up, they might take you somewhere…. I’m holding my first classic car workshop on 3rd May in Hampshire (UK). I never in my wildest dreams thought this would be something I would go on to do.Am I excited?Yes. I’m absolutely buzzing. I’ve been passionate about cars, fixing things with my hands and raiding my dad’s toolbox for a VERY long time. I’ve learnt a lot on the way (which is why I felt semi-ish confident taking on a project as a big as trouble in the first place). As this account has grown, I’ve realised I want to be able to help others to practically do the same which is why I’ve launched this workshop as well as other things like my weekly newsletter where I share my car restoration “Trouble shooting” tips. If you want to learn more about classic cars & classic car maintenance and would like to join me for my workshop, drop me a message.#carrestoration #projectcar #porscherestoration #learnaboutcars #howcarswork #classiccars #classiccarsforbeginners #porsche #classicporsche #garagetime #garagetherapy #menshealth #needahug #builtnotbought #relatable

item.title: This has been one hell of a roller coaster and it’s probably j...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This has been one hell of a roller coaster and it’s probably just the beginning. I quit my 9-5 in 2020 to pursue my dream of working for myself.It wasn’t quite like the “success stories” you read online. It was arguably the opposite….I’ve done a lot of different things over the last few years in my pursuit of self employment. But sadly they ALL had the same end result - failure of some shape or form (at least in my eyes they didn’t create the version of success I had imagined).I hit rock bottom mentally in autumn of 2023. I’m not sure what motivated me (maybe I was looking for an escape) but during this time, I reignited a forgotten hobby and started restoring this rusty Porsche. This was a car that I spent all my sisters and my savings on back in 2019 - a Porsche that my family had been calling Trouble because she was too “far gone”.This rusty little car might continue to spend all our money but she has changed my life:- I’ve grown a huge community of classic car lovers (or people who just love watching what I do whether that be it on social media or my YouTube).- I’ve worked with some amazing brands who have kindly supported her journey (brands I used to dream of working with as a kid).- I’ve launched a weekly newsletter sharing everything I know about working on classics and how to restore things. This is read by hundreds of you every week!- I’ve met the most amazing people (lots of which are now friends). I would never have imagined any of this to be true back in 2020. This week I’m taking things up a gear….I’m launching my first classic car workshop.A Beginner’s Guide to Classic Cars with Lawrence Todd.Am I nervous?Yes.But would any of this have happened if I didn’t get out my comfort zone?No…. I would still be stuck at my desk. The path to success isn’t about never failing. It’s about moving from failure to failure without losing enthusiasm.I’m not stopping any time soon. Drop me a message if you would like more details about the workshop. I’m making it my mission to help others who want to pursue this dream too - it really is possible. #porsche #porscherestoration #classiccar #classiccarrestoration #oldcar

item.title: This was a mess!I should have drained the oil out of the steerin...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This was a mess!I should have drained the oil out of the steering box BEFORE I decided to strip it down.BUTI didn’t. Looking back, it was obvious this was going to happen but I was too eager to strip it down and just didn’t engage brain.Some lessons are learned the hard way… Steering box: 1 - Me: 0. Anyone else had a ‘what have I done?’ moment mid wrench? Drop your best (or worst) mistakes in the comments! #classiccarrestoration #porsche356 #garagefail #porschesteeringbox #steeringbox #learnaboutcars #carrestoration #projectcar #restoration #adultlego

item.title: Passion project or waste of time? I know where I stand. Trouble ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Passion project or waste of time? I know where I stand. Trouble is the ultimate passion project for me.I love every hour I spend in the garage and get excited thinking about those that are to come.Anyone who thinks I’m wasting my life doesn’t know what it means to make art.What’s something you’d spend hours on without regret? Let me know in the comments!#carrestoration #projectcar #classiccarproject #classiccarrestoration #classicporsche #porsche #passionproject #chasingdreams #drivevintage #porsche356 #makingart #myvision #myideaoffun #mypassion #relatable

item.title: What do you think of my pedal box? It has been one of my favouri...
item.description:
View on Instagram


What do you think of my pedal box? It has been one of my favourite transformations so far. What a before and after! 🔥Once everything is clean, restored and ready to be assembled, restoring a (classic) car really is just like adult Lego!You have all the bits and assemble them in the order the exploded diagram shows. You don’t even have to remember how it all goes together.It is hands down my FAVOURITE part of restoring. Everything is clean and assembles as it should. The only thing you sometimes have to fight with are springs… Anyway, the pedal box is finished. Next up, the steering box!Follow along if you want to see more transformations like this! #porscherestoration #porsche #beforeandafter #projectcar #passionproject #classiccar #transformation #onestepcloser #porsche356 #porsche911 #porschebarnfind #oldcar #carrestoration #carstuff #carguy #cargirl #driveclassic #iwillfixyou

item.title: Trouble was originally slate gray but after hearing Chappell Roa...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Trouble was originally slate gray but after hearing Chappell Roan’s Pink Pony Club, I’ve decided to reconsider my options…Trouble’s paintwork is imminent, get your paint colour in the comments! #porsche #porscherestoration #classiccarrestoration #projectcar #carpaint #paintjob #bodyshop #bodywork #classicporsche #classiccar #restomod #barnfind #builtnotbrought #pinkponyclub

item.title: I’m starting to learn that restoring a classic Porsche is just...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I’m starting to learn that restoring a classic Porsche is just a series of increasingly questionable financial decisions disguised as a hobby….Who else has gone way over budget but somehow still needs more parts? Drop your restoration horror stories in the comments! #porsche #porsche356 #norisknoporsche #sendmomey #projectcarlife #classiccarrestoration #classiccarreality #whathaveidone #livinginacar

item.title: Trouble’s pedal box was barely holding on. A few more years in...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Trouble’s pedal box was barely holding on. A few more years in her leaky barn and it would have probably joined her battery and fallen out the floor to be lost forever.Luckily it didn’t…These pedal boxes are currently priced around £400 online (un restored) so I’m pleased it held on, even if it is super duper rusty.I can work with rust but it’s hard to work with something that doesn’t exist.With some careful taps with a hammer, some wd-40, a few screwdriver slips, a hot air gun and some patience, I managed to take the pedal box to pieces and started cleaning the individual bits up.It never fails to amaze me how well steel can clean up. With some fresh paint and new plating it is starting to look like new again!Would you restore a rusty part like this or just buy a new one?#porsche #porscherestoration #oldporsche #classicporsche #classiccar #classiccarrestoration #cartransformation #carproject #porsche356 #porsche911 #driveclassic #restorationprocess #barnfind #pedalbox #pedalboxrestoration #lovecars

item.title: It’s sometimes feels like you’re hitting your head against a...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s sometimes feels like you’re hitting your head against a brick wall when you’re working on (classic) cars…Removing the pitman steering arm from Trouble’s steering box was one of those moments! There isn’t much I need to do to restore Trouble’s steering box. It is made up of a handful of components and if the worm & peg (the two main components in the box) are in good condition, it should be pretty straight forward. All I’ll really need to do is clean it, give it some new paint, install some new seals and rebuild it.I started stripping it down. Following the manual:Step 1: Done.Step 2: Done.Step 3: “Unlock and unscrew retaining nut for drop arm. Pull off drop arm with special tool P 72.”Basically, just undo the clamping nut and pull it off….Easy right? It should have been except, the steering arm wouldn’t just pull off. It was stuck on a taped spline and locked on TIGHT!It seemed that no about of persuasion was going to make it move.The worst bit was that this arm HAD to come off for me to open the up the box and properly assess the condition of the worm and peg.I’ve spent the last two weekends trying to get it off. Then finally on Saturday…BANG.It gave up its grip.Amongst this set back of “lost time” there are some positives…1. I now know tapered splines (especially steering arms) are a bin to remove.2. I spent the last two weekends problem solving with my dad. 3. The moment of joy when it gave will be a memory to last a life time.A serious case of Type 2 fun!What are your worst & best garage moments, share them in the comments!#porscherestoration #classiccarrestoration #carproject #restoration #garagefun #oldcar #oldporsche #porsche #relatable #driveclassic #classiccars #barnfind #shareyourstory

item.title: “Pardon?”“Sorry, say that again?”“Hang on a minute, I ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


“Pardon?”“Sorry, say that again?”“Hang on a minute, I can’t hear.”That’s me. That’s my life now.Years of lawn mowers munching through grass, leaf blowers roaring like jet engines, hammers clanging off the vice, angle grinders spitting sparks, compressors kicking in with an ear-splitting roar and standing too close to racing cars and guess what?I didn’t wear ear defenders.I now have conductive hearing loss AND pulsatile tinnitus as an extra bonus…That means not only am I losing my hearing but I also get a built-in, never-ending background track of whooshing. Neat…not.It’s ironic losing your hearing but at the same time never being able to hear silence again.Anyway, this isn’t a sympathy vote; it’s me sharing my experience. I took my ears for granted and abused them.PSA: Ear defenders are cool. I wish I had worn them earlier. If you enjoy watch practical stuff and classic cars, follow along to see me finally get Trouble on the road. Just don’t be insulted if I don’t hear you cheering….#porscherestoration #classiccarrestoration #carrestoration #carproject #classiccar #builtnotbought #projectcar #iwillfixyou #driveclassic #classiccarinspiration #carinspiration #classiccarsculture #garagereality #relatable #drivevintage #porsche
